Name: WLED Palettes & Controls
Author: Beennnn
Description: 111 static WLED icons for Stream Deck: all 72 colour palettes plus segment, nightlight, button-type and control glyphs, and 11 category tiles. The static companion to WLED Effects. Unofficial fan-made pack — not affiliated with, or endorsed by, the WLED project; "WLED" names compatibility only.
